---
name: Documentation improvement
description: Suggest clearer docs, diagrams, or runbook updates
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

**Which doc or area?**  
(e.g. README, `docs/architecture.md`, monitor setup, systemd, security)

**What is wrong or missing?**  
Confusion, outdated command, missing prerequisite, etc.

**Proposed change**  
Outline the new text or structure (paste a draft if you have one).

**Audience**  
Operator on Garuda / macOS miner / contributor?

**Checklist**

- [ ] I checked existing docs and issues for duplicates
- [ ] I am not pasting `.env`, seeds, or API tokens
